title: Opening for Category Manager at Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates!
